title: WebhookConfig derives Debug, leaking webhook keys
description: config.rs:34 derives Debug on WebhookConfig which contains the 'key' field (webhook secret). Config (line 6) also derives Debug, so any {:?} formatting of the config (e.g., in error messages, logging, or future debug statements) would print webhook keys to logs. The fix is to remove Debug from WebhookConfig (or implement a manual Debug that redacts the key field), and remove Debug from Config or make it manually redact nested secrets. This is a confidentiality issue: webhook keys could appear in log output. Locations: config.rs:6 (Config derives Debug), config.rs:34 (WebhookConfig derives Debug with pub key: String field).
close_reason: WebhookConfig now has manual Debug impl that redacts key field
